finding: A prompt that explicitly asks to read `WORKSPACE-UNFINISHED-WORK.md` was classified as task-scoped, but `next --prompt` could not resolve the active task from the handoff filename and failed with `ATM_NEXT_TASK_SCOPE_NOT_FOUND` instead of offering the uniquely active governed task.
expectedBehavior: Handoff/task-root hints should resolve to the active task when the live ledger has exactly one matching running claim, or emit the exact task id and a bounded resume command without falling back to unrelated tasks.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed in TASK-AAO-0175: handoff prompts now read referenced task ids, route to the unique active claim, and return selection-required for multiple active claims; stale completed references do not fall back. `node --strip-types tests/cli/handoff-resume-route.test.ts`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run validate:cli` passed.
followUp: Keep the handoff filename, stale-reference, unique-active, and multi-claim regressions; row 154 separately tracks stale frozen-runner write preflight.
